prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次依次约 25854→36171→31029→37119→50163，整体呈波动后移趋势，尤其 2025 年较 2024 年大幅后移约 13044 名，基准位次约 50163 名；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划：2021 年 101 人、2022 年 101 人、2023 年 103 人、2024 年 101 人、2025 年 108 人；2026 年计划 110 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招 2 人，扩招幅度约 1.85%，对竞争略有缓解但影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北林业大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第 115 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 113–115 名区间，属于中游偏上 211；该校在声誉舆情文件中未见明显正面或负面事件，声誉整体平稳；抖音热度排名第 59 位（较热），综合热度约 54.3 万，在 211 高校中处于中等偏上水平，有一定关注度但非顶尖热度；投档异常文件中无该校断档记录；第五轮学科评估文件中未收录东北林业大学数据，该校优势学科（如林业工程 A+、风景园林学 A、林学 A 等）未在本次数据源中体现，故。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业以计算机类、电子信息类、电气类、人工智能等为主，这些专业在 2024–2026 年专业热度分析中均被评为「高热推荐」或「推荐」，社会报考热度持续高位；湖南省 2026 年物理类考生约 347000 人，较 2025 年 320192 人增加约 8.4%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；学校位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，距湖南省较远，跨省报考存在一定地域偏好折损。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移的走势惯性、2026 年小幅扩招（约 1.85%）的缓解作用、物理类考生增加约 8.4% 带来的竞争加剧，以及计算机/电子信息等热门专业持续高热对报考的拉动；预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 50520 名，区间 50020–51020 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 25854 → 36171 → 31029 → 37119 → 50163, showing a fluctuating and backward trend overall. Especially in 2025, it shifted significantly backward by about 13044 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 50163. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan Province: 101 in 2021, 101 in 2022, 103 in 2023, 101 in 2024, 108 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 110, a slight expansion of 2 students compared to 2025, an expansion rate of about 1.85%, which slightly eases competition but has limited impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Forestry University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University main ranking is about 115th (2026), with recent rankings stable in the 113–115 range, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The university has no significant positive or negative events in reputation public opinion files, with overall stable reputation; Douyin popularity ranking is 59th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 543,000, at an upper-middle level among 211 universities, with some attention but not top-tier popularity; there are no records of enrollment gaps in the abnormal enrollment files; the fifth round of discipline evaluation files do not include data for Northeast Forestry University, and its advantageous disciplines (such as Forestry Engineering A+, Landscape Architecture A, Forestry A, etc.) are not reflected in this data source, hence.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Physics Category enrollment majors mainly include Computer Science, Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, etc. These majors are rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with sustained high social application popularity; the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province in 2026 is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% compared to 320,192 in 2025, significantly expanding the examinee scale and intensifying competition; the university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Hunan Province, with some regional preference discount for cross-province applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the inertia of the significant backward trend in 2025 rankings, the slight easing effect of the 2026 small expansion (about 1.85%), the intensified competition from an 8.4% increase in Physics Category examinees, and the sustained high popularity of hot majors like Computer Science/Electronic Information driving applications; the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 50520, with a range of 50020–51020.
